text.title: cap-pacelc-walkthrough Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the read-availability impact of a partition acceptable for the business?

conclusion.verdict: cap_mode=CP; choose CP store (Spanner, etcd, Postgres+sync replicas)
cap_mode=AP; pacelc_mode=EC (DynamoDB strong reads or Cassandra QUORUM)
